description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The exterior is primarily composed of light brown brick and white plaster, with large glass windows providing ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved driveway with a parked car, landscaped greenery, and a small patio area with outdoor furniture. The rooftop terrace is furnished with lounge chairs, umbrellas, and potted plants, offering a comfortable outdoor living space. The rear of the house opens to a grassy backyard with additional seating and a palm tree. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, and landscaped outdoor areas. The exterior features brick, white plaster, and glass, with both front and rear patios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rooftop terrace, large windows, and a car parked on the driveway, with visible landscaping and patio furniture.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the grassy backyard, palm tree, and patio area, as well as the open rooftop terrace and large glass doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, car, and more of the rooftop terrace, with a clear view of the house's geometric structure.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, large windows, driveway with car, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, minimal steps, no porch, and simple landscaping.
